query:
UPDATE quotationItems 
SET closetConfig = JSON_UNQUOTE(closetConfig)
WHERE quotationId = '4380001' 
AND itemType = 'closet';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute UPDATE quotationItems

WHERE quotationId = '4380001' 
AND itemType = 'closet';
